subcodes.first_line: O servant at the threshold of Baha! There is no end whatsoever to our detainment in Paris. There is a wisdom in this that will become clear later
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان بهاء بهیچوجه خلاص از پاریس نمی شویم حکمتی در اینست بعد معلوم
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for protection, @personal instructions, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
